channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Overflowing bins, 7th May
item.description:
Overflowing bins on property - please help, we need additional bins. Not helping with rodents/foxes/birds.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Finsbury Park Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Traffic light exiting Royal College Street stuck on red intermittently, 7th May
item.description:
I passed through here on my bike at 1pm today and I was held for 4 rotations of this stuck red light. There was a 46 bus held behind me so he/she was delayed for 10 minutes at least. This is not the first time I have experienced it. I have reported it before but again your operatives haven’t identified a fault. There IS A FAULT with these lights or you will have exasperated drivers jumping the lights frequently (I have seen this also happen) and cause an accident).
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Castle Road, Kentish Town, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Access cover off, 7th May
item.description:
Access cover off lamppost

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Leswin Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Street Light - Equipment damaged, pole leaning

item.title: Streets need sweeping from autumn leaves. The road is full of weeds and leaf matter., 7th May
item.description:
This is not the first time I have written to ask for the streets to be cleaned. They are full of leaf matter and debris which when it rains blocks the Drains and the Street floods. Also, the tree stump has a lot of weed around it and there are also weeds growing along the curbside. The tree was filled over a year ago and the stump has still not been removed and a new Tree replaced.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cranbourne Gardens, Temple Fortune, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown plants extends out on the pavement - narrowing it and causing children to walk on the very busy road on Dartmouth Road., 7th May
item.description:
This is a constant issue - the plants need to be cut down and contained as it is forcing the pedestrians to have limited view and to walk into incoming traffic
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dartmouth Road, Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Near communal bins, Goldsmith Row, E2 8QT, 7th May
item.description:
There are household items; Cupboards, mattresses tables
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Goldsmiths Row, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pieces of cardboard left behind Road sign and on Road and loiter over pavement. d, 7th May
item.description:
Repeated events of articles and litter being dumped at the top of Padua Road with the junction of Croydon Rd.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 34, Padua Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip, 7th May
item.description:
Garden waste dumped by a van, including a tree stump, branches, black sacks etc.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rectory Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large laughing gas canister, 7th May
item.description:
I found a large laughing gas canister in the gutter which I have placed beside the green box for appropriate disposal. Thank you.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Thornet Wood Road, Bickley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cars parked on a "NO PARKING" side of the road, 7th May
item.description:
The vans on the right of the picture are parked on a NO PARKING area (paint on the ground fading a bit but still clear to read). When cars park (legally) on the opposite side, which has a single yellow line, there is no room for a car to get through the middle and the road gets blocked. If, God forbid, An ambulance or fire engine has to go through someone could literally lose their life!

Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road and pavement needs sweeping daily., 7th May
item.description:
There is constant litter & food waste opposite Astbury Road Business Park. This, as well as urine, is thrown on to pavement by a man that sleeps in his car every day. There is also broken glass outside the business park.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Astbury Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped on council land next to 66 Quentin Road, 7th May
item.description:
This rubbish has been here for several weeks. It included household rubbish and food waste which foxes dragged all over the street. I cleaned this up. But the cardboard etc remains. Please can this be removed to stop more rubbish being dumped here.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 220-234, Dacre Park, Blackheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 7th May
item.description:
A large bag containing unknown items, and a liquid canister dumped by the fence of the water sports centre.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rope Street, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fallen tree in Widmore Recreation Ground, 7th May
item.description:
This is laying on the ground on the bank and has some sharp edges.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lewes Road, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pink bag fly tippers ever present ruining Blackheath Standard, 7th May
item.description:
Pink bag food laden fox feeding fly tipping again and again yesterday it was cleaned by council. What is the council doing about this?

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Invicta Road, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox, 7th May
item.description:
Resident has called to report a dead fox at the junction of Breakspears Drive and Mickleham Road. Please can this be arranged and collected.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 67, Mickleham Road, St Paul's Cray, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Deep pothole at the edge of pedestrian crossing, 7th May
item.description:
The Council appear to be uninterested or cannot be bothered, it should be listed as dangerous
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Anglesea Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Full bin, 7th May
item.description:
Litter bin full by bus stop
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woolwich Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter, 7th May
item.description:
Litter is everywhere in barham Road from green lanes to Redhill. Its about time our road was cleaned regularly. You charge enough

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 63, Barham Road, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Twitten between Maurice Walk and Falloden Way totally overgrown, 7th May
item.description:
Twitten between Maurice Walk and Falloden Way totally overgrown

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Falloden Way, Hampstead Garden Suburb, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
